title: Ubiquiti UACC-OFC-S2-LULU-0.5M-50 - Optical Patch Cord LCupc/LCupc, Duplex, Singlemode 9/125, 0.5m, 50-pack
category: Optical networks / Patch cords / Single Mode
description: An optical cable suitable for connecting active devices (e.g., switch, router, server). It uses single-mode 9/125 fibers terminated with two LC connectors on both ends . The overall cable diameter is 2mm The ferrule polishing is in UPC configuration. The sheath is LSZH (Low Smoke Zero Halogen) The cable length is 0.5m in a 50-pack
specsSearch: Optics Number of fibers 2 Fiber type Single Mode Core diameter [µm] 9/125 Polishing type UPC Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors LC - LC
